summary: SEO Module Testing Complete - All core features working. Backend APIs (25/25 tests passed), Frontend pages load correctly with proper SEO elements. One design issue found: Area content section shows raw markdown instead of rendered HTML.

ui_bugs.issue: Area content section displays raw markdown syntax (##, ###, **) instead of rendered HTML. The content uses dangerouslySetInnerHTML with simple newline replacement but doesn't convert markdown to HTML like BlogPostPage does with ReactMarkdown.
ui_bugs.fix_suggestion: Use ReactMarkdown component (already imported in BlogPostPage) to render the areaContent instead of dangerouslySetInnerHTML

issues: Area content section shows raw markdown: '## About Mohali', '### Why Choose Mohali?', '**Connectivity**' instead of formatted headings and bold text

action_items: Fix SEOListingPage.jsx line 330-332: Replace dangerouslySetInnerHTML with ReactMarkdown component to properly render area content markdown
critical_code_review_comments: SEOListingPage.jsx uses dangerouslySetInnerHTML for area content but the content is markdown format - should use ReactMarkdown like BlogPostPage.jsx does
All SEO API endpoints correctly exclude sensitive data (exact_address, latitude, longitude, owner_phone, owner_id)
SEO pages are properly PUBLIC (no auth required) - verified by tests
Sitemap.xml generates valid XML with proper URL structure and all required pages

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all pages load, navigation works, one markdown rendering issue)

test_credentials: N/A - SEO pages are PUBLIC, no authentication required
seed_data_creation: None - used existing properties in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: SEO module is fully functional. Backend APIs work correctly. Frontend pages load with proper SEO elements (H1, meta tags, breadcrumbs, filters, pagination, FAQ, internal links). One issue: area content section in SEOListingPage.jsx shows raw markdown - needs ReactMarkdown component.

SEO_Listing_Page_Rent.details: Page loads with properties, filters, pagination, FAQ section, internal links. Shows 2 properties from Mohali.

SEO_Listing_Page_Buy_Fallback.details: Fallback system works correctly - shows 'No Properties Listed Yet' message with 'Explore All Properties' button when no properties match.

SEO_Listing_Page_PG.details: PG listing page loads correctly with properties and all SEO elements.

Blog_Listing_Page.details: Shows featured articles, category filters, search input, 10 blog articles, newsletter section.

Blog_Post_Page.details: Full blog post renders with ReactMarkdown, author info, date, read time, share buttons, tags, FAQ, related articles, CTA banner.

Sitemap_Page.details: Shows 1,367+ pages count, download sitemap.xml button, tabs for Rent/Buy/PG/Blogs, expandable city cards with area links.

API_SEO_Properties.details: Returns properties with filters (city, area, bedrooms, price range, listing_type). Excludes sensitive data. No auth required.

API_Sitemap_XML.details: Returns valid XML sitemap with all city pages, property type pages, area pages, and blog pages.

API_Sitemap_Data.details: Returns cities with property counts, property type distribution, total property count.

Navigation_Between_SEO_Pages.details: Rent, Buy, PG, Blog links in header work correctly. Book Visit button navigates to main app login.

SEO_Pages_No_Auth_Required.details: All SEO endpoints and pages are PUBLIC - no authentication required.

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real - SEO endpoints read from MongoDB
